docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUL-06-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF CHRIS MILLER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL AKA EQUITY RESIDENTIAL SERVICES LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENED BY MICHAEL LOPEZ, PROPERTY MANAGER. THE COURT FINDS PROOF OF SERVICE DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED FEB-11-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL   EQUITY RESIDENTIAL, AKA EQUITY RESIDENTIAL SERVICE LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL AKA EQUITY RESIDENTIAL SERVICES, LLC REPRESENTED BY MICHEAL LOPEZ, PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM.
(SC-104) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -MICHAEL LOPEZ TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL   EQUITY RESIDENTIAL, AKA EQUITY RESIDENTIAL SERVICE LLC
ORDER TO VACATE IS GRANTED AND CASE IS CONTINUED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,700.71 FILED BY MILLER, CHRIS AS TO DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL   EQUITY RESIDENTIAL, AKA EQUITY RESIDENTIAL SERVICE LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLANITIFF STIPULATES TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CHRIS MILLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, CHRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL   EQUITY RESIDENTIAL, AKA EQUITY RESIDENTIAL SERVICE LLC $4,000.71 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,160.71 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL   EQUITY RESIDENTIAL, AKA EQUITY RESIDENTIAL SERVICE LLC HEARING SET FOR MAY-06-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PREFERRED MAILING ADDRESS. FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL   EQUITY RESIDENTIAL, AKA EQUITY RESIDENTIAL SERVICE LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL   EQUITY RESIDENTIAL, AKA EQUITY RESIDENTIAL SERVICE LLC
